subject: Insurance Renewal - D&O and E&O Coverage
body:
Legal and Finance Teams,

Our D&O and E&O insurance policies are up for renewal on April 15th. Summary of quotes received:

D&O Insurance:
- Current premium: $185K/year, $10M aggregate limit
- Renewal quote: $210K/year (13.5% increase due to market hardening)
- Alternative carrier: $195K/year with same terms

E&O Insurance:
- Current premium: $120K/year, $5M aggregate limit
- Renewal quote: $135K/year
- Recommendation: Increase limit to $10M given our growing customer base ($165K/year)

Key considerations:
- Our Series B will require adequate D&O coverage
- Two new board members need to be added to the policy
- Cyber liability rider available for additional $45K

I recommend we go with the alternative carrier for D&O and increase E&O limits. Total annual cost: $360K vs current $305K.
